---
id: delete-o-auth-2-token
title: "Delete OAuth 2.0 Access Tokens from specific OAuth 2.0 Client"
description: "This endpoint deletes OAuth2 access tokens issued to an OAuth 2.0 Client from the database."
sidebar_label: "Delete OAuth 2.0 Access Tokens from specific OAuth 2.0 Client"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete OAuth 2.0 Access Tokens from specific OAuth 2.0 Client"}
></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"delete"} path={"/admin/oauth2/tokens"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint deletes OAuth2 access tokens issued to an OAuth 2.0 Client from the database.

  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
